title: Ring-a-ding
description: Cute service bell, for your freaky demands.
body:
A service bell, what is a service bell. Well, the bell provides a service of servicing the servicee, serving that service quite well actually given it is a bell. Indeed, a service bell excels at signaling servants to swiftly serve, thereby securing superior service satisfaction to the serviced, who surely savor such seamlessly supplied service.

But anyways, the gist of it is this, the bell will ping the person who placed it. If anyone rings it, it pings the person who placed it. It uses toasts and is crafted with a name tag and a bell.

Have fun and use it responsibly, meant for servers with light elements of RP for shops and such.

Support maybe later for NeoForge because NeoForge sounds fun.
